description: Quadcopter drone chassis in an X configuration, featuring a central disc hub, four diagonal arms, outer motor mount platforms, and necessary mounting and shaft holes.
components: Four diagonal arms (10mm wide, 55mm long, rotated at 45, 135, 225, 315 degrees)
Four circular motor mount platforms (18mm diameter, 3mm thick, centered at arm tips)
Four motor shaft holes (5mm diameter, through-all, centered at arm tips)
Four M3 central mounting holes (3.2mm diameter, through-all, in a 20x20mm square pattern)
notes: Recommend using rotated workplanes or coordinate transformations (polar rotation of 45, 135, 225, 315 degrees) to define the arms and motor mounts. Ensure all solid bodies are boolean-unioned into a single manifold chassis before subtracting the 4 central mounting holes and the 4 motor shaft holes. Coordinates of motor mounts are at (±51.62, ±51.62) on the XY plane. Center of the chassis is at (0,0,1.5) if Z ranges from 0 to 3.
